name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, participants, coordinator
VARIABLES messages, state, votes

    /\ participants \subseteq Nat
    /\ coordinator \in Nat
    /\ state \in [participants \cup {coordinator} -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
    /\ votes \in [participants -> {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]
    /\ messages \subseteq [sender \in participants \cup {coordinator}, receiver \in participants \cup {coordinator}, type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, content \in {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]

Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in participants \cup {coordinator} |-> "Init"]
    /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "Pending"]
    /\ messages = {}

Next ==
    \/ /\ coordinator \in participants
       /\ state[coordinator] = "Init"
       /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare", content |-> "Pending"] : p \in participants }
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Prepared"]
       /\ votes' = votes
    \/ /\ \E p \in participants:
          /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
          /\ votes[p] = "Pending"
          /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteYes", content |-> "Yes"] }
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
          /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Yes"]
    \/ /\ \E p \in participants:
          /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
          /\ votes[p] = "Pending"
          /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> coordinator, type |-> "VoteNo", content |-> "No"] }
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
          /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "No"]
    \/ /\ state[coordinator] = "Prepared"
       /\ \E p \in participants:
          /\ votes[p] = "Yes"
          /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit", content |-> "Committed"] }
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Committed"]
          /\ votes' = votes
    \/ /\ state[coordinator] = "Prepared"
       /\ \E p \in participants:
          /\ votes[p] = "No"
          /\ messages' = messages \cup { [sender |-> coordinator, receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort", content |-> "Aborted"] }
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = "Aborted"]
          /\ votes' = votes
    \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "Commit"
          /\ state[m.receiver] = "Committed"
          /\ messages' = messages \ { m }
    \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "Abort"
          /\ state[m.receiver] = "Aborted"
          /\ messages' = messages \ { m }
    \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "VoteYes"
          /\ votes[m.sender] = "Yes"
          /\ messages' = messages \ { m }
    \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "VoteNo"
          /\ votes[m.sender] = "No"
          /\ messages' = messages \ { m }
    \/ /\ \E m \in messages:
          /\ m.type = "Prepare"
          /\ state[m.sender] = "Prepared"
          /\ messages' = messages \ { m }

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states


  states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"];  (* "thinking", "hungry", "eating" *)

      pickUp(i);

      putDown(i);

  parallel
    for i \in 1..N do
      philosopher(i)
    end for
  end parallel

*)

(* Helper function to get the next philosopher/fork index *)
Next(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: all forks are free, all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> FALSE]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation: each philosopher can pick up or put down forks *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![Next(i)] = TRUE]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![Next(i)] = FALSE]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Type invariant: forks is a function from 1..N to BOOLEAN, states is a function from 1..N to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in 1..N -> BOOLEAN
          /\ states \in 1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)
           /\ size' = size + 1

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ size' = size - 1

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* State definitions *)
Follower == state = Follower
Candidate == state = Candidate
Leader == state = Leader

(* Type definitions *)
Server == 1..N
None == 0

(* TypeOK definition *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Server
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ /\ state = Follower
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = Candidate
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = None
  \/ /\ state = Candidate
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = Leader
     \/ /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = Follower
  \/ /\ state = Leader
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = Leader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A r \in readers : r = r
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \A r \in readers : r = r

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES token, messages

(* The token is an integer in 1..N indicating the current holder *)
Token == token \in 1..N

(* Messages is a sequence of messages, each message is a tuple [sender, receiver, content] *)
Message == [sender \in 1..N, receiver \in 1..N, content \in Nat]
Messages == messages \in Seq(Message)

(* Initial state: token starts at node 1, no messages *)
Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ messages = <<>>

(* Next state: token passes to the next node, optionally a message is sent *)
Next == /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
        /\ messages' = IF token' = 1 THEN Append(messages, [sender |-> token, receiver |-> 1, content |-> 0]) ELSE messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store



Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = store[k]]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = store[k]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE /-> 0]

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, lastChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = IF lastChunk \in sentChunks THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE 0
    /\ channelState' = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> IF i = lastChunk THEN 1 ELSE channelState[i]]
    /\ lastChunk \in 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ lastChunk \notin sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>
